# Pattern: RS2007 — Missing or invalid release header in AnalyzerReleases.Unshipped.md

## Rule

RS2007: Analyzer release file 'AnalyzerReleases.Unshipped.md' has a missing or invalid release header.

## Cause

The file starts directly with `## Unshipped` instead of having comment lines (`;`) before the section header.

## Fix

Add comment header before the `## Unshipped` line:

```markdown
; Do not edit this file. It is used for Roslyn analyzer release tracking.
; Entries should follow the format:
; Rule ID | Category | Severity | Notes

## Unshipped
```

## Scope

All `AnalyzerReleases.Unshipped.md` files in source generator projects.
